exploration_notes: The bug centers on apps/web/src/Unread.ts, specifically the doesTimelineHaveUnreadMessages function. Three issues were identified and fixed: (1) Thread-scoped receipts ignored: the function always called room.hasUserReadEvent() even for thread timelines, bypassing Thread.hasUserReadEvent() which has special logic for thread-scoped and unthreaded receipt comparisons.
